UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOME SAVINGS OF AMERICA, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEE, GORDON G. H.
